title: polystichum auritum
intro: Polystichum auritum, also known as the Golden Polypody or Five-Point Fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and the Americas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Polystichum auritum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Polystichum auritum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried fronds often being used in Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine.
